data.title: Goosehead Insurance subsidiary gets new $300M term loan
data.description:
• Goosehead Insurance (NASDAQ:GSHD) said that its subsidiary, Goosehead Insurance Holdings closed on a $300 million term loan B and $75 million revolving credit facility.
  • The term loan facility will bear interest at a rate of SOFR plus 3.50%.
  • Proceeds from the new term loan agreement will be used to retire the company’s existing $93 million term loan, pay a one-time special dividend, and other general corporate purposes.
  • The maturation date of the new term loan facility is January 8, 2032.

data.title: Ivanhoe Mines launches offering of $600 million senior notes
data.description:
• Ivanhoe Mines (TSX:IVN:CA) on Friday said it has commenced an offering (the "Offering") of $600 million senior notes due 2030.
  • In connection with the offering, the company entered into a $120.0 million revolving credit facility agreement dated December 22, 2024, with, amongst others, the guarantors and the lenders named therein.
  • The gross proceeds from the offering of the Notes will be used for general corporate purposes and to pay certain fees and expenses relating to the offering, said the company.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Fresh Vine Wine reports non-compliance with NYSE American
data.description:
• Fresh Vine Wine (NYSE:VINE) received a notice from NYSE American stating that it is not in compliance because it missed holding its annual meeting for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023, by the December 31, 2024 deadline.
  • Fresh Vine intends to hold a meeting of stockholders in the next several months with respect to the proposed business combination with Adifex Holdings, expecting it will bring VINE into NYSE American compliance.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Prospera Energy gets new operations chief
data.description:
• Prospera (TSXV:PEI:CA) appointed Darren Jackson as its COO, effective January 1, 2025.
  • The company also completed its non-brokered unit offering, for total proceeds of $900K.
  • Prospera intends to use the net proceeds for production optimization and general working capital.

data.title: AppLovin in focus as Benchmark starts with Buy rating
data.description:
• AppLovin (NASDAQ:APP) was in focus on Friday as investment firm Benchmark started coverage on the mobile software company with a Buy rating and a $375 price target.
  • Shares fell 3.5% in premarket trading.
  • "Key catalysts include continued advancements in its AXON AI technology, which not only enable the company to expand into new verticals such as e-commerce and connected TV, but also drive substantial growth within its core advertising business in mobile gaming," analyst Mike Hickey wrote in a note to clients. "Together, these areas present significant revenue growth and profitability expansion opportunities for 2025 and beyond."
  • Delving a bit deeper, Hickey said AppLovin's AXON AI engine and increased adoption across a number of markets should help it sustain long-term revenue growth and margin expansion, as customers are able to get better user targeting and increased return on investment.

data.title: Auri and Hollywall join hans to roll out new crytocurrency
data.description:
• Auri (OTCPK:AURI) and Hollywall Entertainment (OTCPK:HWAL) formed a new joint venture to develop a Digital Currency backed by rare music rights.
  • Recently Auri announced the ability to, issue and list new crypto currencies, process credit cards, and exchange tokens in Europe.
  • AURI and HWAL are preparing a definitive stock swap agreement consummating this arrangement and anticipate it's signing in the coming week.
  • "Due to the enthusiasm of our European partner, the government of Moldova, we have been fast tracked to introduce these new coins, with great anticipation to Europe in addition to the excited market that exists here in the US." said Edward Vakser, AURI's CEO.

data.title: Calidi Biotherapeutics slumps 29%, prices $4.25M stock offering
data.description:
• Clinical-stage biotechnology company Calidi Biotherapeutics (NYSE:CLDI) priced its public offering of 5M shares of common stock at a price of $0.85 per share.

  • The closing of the offering is expected to occur on or about January 10, 2025.

  • The gross proceeds are expected to be ~$4.25 million.

  • Calidi (CLDI) intends to use the net proceeds from the offering for working capital and for general corporate purposes.

  • The stock price dropped 29.6% to $0.95 on Friday during pre-market hours of trading.

data.title: Jobs data in charts: December payroll growth hits highest level since March
Genius raises Bitcoin Treasury by additional $5M
data.description:
• Genius (NYSE:GNS) said it has upped its Bitcoin (BTC-USD) purchases for its Bitcoin Treasury by an additional $5 million to 372 Bitcoin for $35 million.
  • The average price was $94,047 per Bitcoin.
  • The milestone to reach 30% of the initial target of $120 million was ahead of its target schedule, the firm said.

data.title: Ventripoint Diagnostics issues shares for payment of debenture interest
data.description:
• Ventripoint Diagnostics (TSXV:VPT:CA) on Friday said it will issue up to 83,864 common shares for the payment of $9,225.20 of interest on certain outstanding convertible debentures issued on June 28, 2025.
  • The convertible debentures bear interest at the rate of 10% per annum, payable every 6 months, said the company.
  • The shares will be issued at a deemed price of $0.11, subject to the approval of TSXV and are subject to a hold period of 4 months and one day, it added.
  • The company also said it has received TSXV approval to issue an aggregate of 32,769 common shares to settle an aggregate of $3,276 of interest in respect of convertible debentures issued on May 10, 2025.
  • Source: Press Release
